steps.t: Explore the Nink-hai camp along the mountain path east of Faldham. Langfrith has asked you to infiltrate the Orc camp and overthrow the leader of the …
The Nink-hai leader can be found at the end of the mountain pass in the mountains. Langfrith has asked you to infiltrate the Orc camp and defeat the l…
Langfrith awaits oustide the mead hall of Faldham. Langfrith will wish to know of the events that transpired when you confronted the Nink-hai leader.
